---
title: "Honey Mustard"
author: "Chris Kornaros"
date: 2026-03-06
categories: ["Sauces and Condiments"]
---

**Ingredients:**

-   3 tbsp mayo

-   1.5 tbsp mustard

-   2 tbsp honey

-   ½ teaspoon white distilled

-   ⅛ teaspoon cayenne

-   ½ teaspoon salt

-   ¼ teaspoon black pepper

**Directions:**

1.  Whisk to combine
